text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan and I are preparing for the Osaka
Hai, the first race of the Senior Spring Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Others find our training methods silly, but we do
what needs to be done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Osaka Hai, she provokes Gold
Ship, declaring that she'll be the bigger dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship seems amused and answers with a
laugh.
